calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-21-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Chris D. Kuhner, Esq. for Plaintiff: Perkins Clie LLP.
Plaintiff's witness: Mark Schickman, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the defaulted Defendant: Kindmark, Inc. as follows:
Principal $246,598.40
Interest $25,058.52
Late charges $4,931.96
Attorney's Fees $3,653.75
Costs $474.09 for a total of $280,716.72
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2004 Continued To Jan-07-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
